title: better-glowingfriends
body:
Better glowingfriends with more features, enemy/ally/friend
/glowingfriends or /gwf instead of having to write /glowingfriends
very awesome cool mod I love open source I need 26 more characters for upload

Modified from GlowingFriends,licensed under GPL-3.0


shoutout to diorgepig,Squitsh,KoszeTrawe,Fortnerd
for being in the icon
